title: Midnight Craving Rich Brazilian Leek Paella
description: A savory and rich paella dish featuring leeks and a touch of sweetness from pineapple and candy. Perfect for a late-night craving.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the leeks and cook until they start to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, cayenne pepper, and a pinch of salt, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the diced ham and cook for 2 minutes, until lightly browned.
Add the chicken broth, saffron, and garlic, and bring to a boil.
Add the rice and stir to coat with the flavors, then add the chickpeas and caramelized onions.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 25-30 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and stir in the pineapple candy.
Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 5 minutes, until the flavors have melded together.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro or scallions, if desired.
